--- limit_skip.sql
GRAPH FinGraph
RETURN a
SKIP 5 LIMIT 10

--- AST
&ast.GQLGraphQuery{
  GraphClause: &ast.GQLGraphClause{
    PropertyGraphName: &ast.Path{
      Idents: []*ast.Ident{
        &ast.Ident{
          NamePos: 6,
          NameEnd: 14,
          Name:    "FinGraph",
        },
      },
    },
  },
  Query: &ast.GQLMultiLinearQueryStatement{
    Statements: []ast.GQLLinearQueryStatement{
      &ast.GQLSimpleLinearQueryStatement{
        Statements: []ast.GQLPrimitiveQueryStatement{
          &ast.GQLReturn{
            Return: 15,
            Items:  []*ast.GQLReturnItem{
              &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                Star: -1,
                Expr: &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 22,
                  NameEnd: 23,
                  Name:    "a",
                },
              },
            },
            Offset: &ast.GQLOffset{
              OffsetPos: 24,
              Keyword:   "SKIP",
              Offset:    &ast.IntLiteral{
                ValuePos: 29,
                ValueEnd: 30,
                Base:     10,
                Value:    "5",
              },
            },
            Limit: &ast.GQLLimit{
              LimitPos: 31,
              Limit:    &ast.IntLiteral{
                ValuePos: 37,
                ValueEnd: 39,
                Base:     10,
                Value:    "10",
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
GRAPH FinGraph RETURN a SKIP 5 LIMIT 10
